name: verinode
description: 検証のプロ — AI エージェント向けファクトチェックと決済ゲート（HTTP POST /verify、未払い時は 200 + payment_required + X-Payment-Link）

skills.description: REST: POST __PUBLIC_BASE_URL__/verify with JSON body {"claim":"..."}. If status is payment_required, follow X-Payment-Link / reason URL (Stripe), then retry with X-Payment-Proof: cs_... . Not A2A SendMessage.
